title: Marketplace Manager - Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd!
